title: Invitrogen Platinum Taq PCR
description: Thermo Fisher Platinum Taq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL antibody hot-start reaction with a 94 C denaturation.

payload.notes: Vendor: Thermo Fisher Scientific (Invitrogen), Platinum Taq DNA Polymerase (Cat. 10966). Antibody-mediated hot start: the enzyme is activated at 94 C, so an initial 94 C incubation (30 sec to 2 min) is required. The manual cycling table has no separate final-extension step, so none is included here. Annealing 55 C is the manual's starting point, optimize to your primer Tm. Cycles 25-35. Extension 1 min/kb at 72 C. Optimize MgCl2 1.5-3.0 mM in 0.25 mM steps; use 2-2.5 U enzyme for longer/genomic targets. Source: https://documents.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/LSG/manuals/100004289_PlatinumTaqDNApolymerase_man.pdf
